title: ardisiandra wettsteinii
intro: Ardisiandra wettsteinii, also known as Wettstein's ardisiandra, is a species of flowering plant in the family Primulaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Ardisiandra wettsteinii include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, and can also be made into capsules or dried for later use.
